body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-40961", "cvss": {"score": 7.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:C/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:C/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-601", "name": "URL Redirection to Untrusted Site ('Open Redirect')"}], "description": "A bug in the login redirect route in Apache Airflow allowed authenticated users to craft URLs that bypassed the `is_safe_url` check, enabling redirection from a trusted Airflow domain to an attacker-controlled origin. Users are advised to upgrade to `apache-airflow` 3.2.2 or later. As a defense-in-depth mitigation, deployment operators can place Airflow behind a reverse proxy that strips off-domain `next=` query parameters before they reach the login endpoint.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00649, "percentile": 0.4673}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-6hcw-qqr8-pjj8", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-07T23:47:17Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-6hcw-qqr8-pjj8", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-6hcw-qqr8-pjj8"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-40961"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-01T09:16:18Z", "published_at": "2026-06-01T09:31:13Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-40961", "https://github.com/apache/airflow/pull/65557", "https://lists.apache.org/thread/qmt8ksh7gty6b8hr9w294t94j36jdv1q", "http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2026/05/31/2", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-6hcw-qqr8-pjj8"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/apache/airflow", "summary": "Apache Airflow: Authenticated users can bypass the `is_safe_url` check", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-07T23:47:18Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-6hcw-qqr8-pjj8", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.2.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "apache-airflow"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 3.2.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Apache Airflow: Authenticated users can bypass the `is_safe_url` check
